barRaise.topFinding: Eighth straight cycle on the uncommitted v0.98.10, and this cycle a second HIGH opened: the local git repo has a corrupt loose object. The footprint-rebalance work is still fully authored - GDD pill v0.98.10 (docs/GDD.html:1380), the changelog entry (:4913), the roster-wide edits in source/world3d/building_catalog_3d.gd - but HEAD is still 3918336 (v0.98.9, 2026-06-15), project.godot config/version reads 0.98.9 (:15), and the tree has been dirty seven days. Separately, blob d188556 (the tracked asset assets/art/temp/hoardes_commandcenter_gentest_v0_1.png) fails its zlib checksum on disk, so git fsck, git diff across the full tree, and git gc all error out - FUSE corruption reaching into .git itself. The good copy is on origin, so repair is low-risk, and the corruption does not block the release (the four dirty files do not reference that blob and it is already pushed). Land v0.98.10 with scripts/release.ps1 or revert it, and repair the object from origin; the two HIGHs are independent. Verdict drops to at-risk on the second HIGH.

actions.title: Repair the corrupt loose object d188556 (tracked asset assets/art/temp/hoardes_commandcenter_gentest_v0_1.png): remove .git/objects/d1/88556d... and re-fetch from origin (which holds the intact blob), then git fsck to confirm clean. git fsck / git diff full-tree / git gc currently fail with a zlib data-check error. Independent of the v0.98.10 commit.

Run scripts/release.ps1 to commit + push v0.98.10 so HEAD, project.godot (0.98.9 -> 0.98.10), and the GDD pill reconcile and the dirty GDD.html / project.godot / building_catalog_3d.gd stop sitting exposed an eighth cycle. Revert the rebalance if it is not landing.

Run the deferred defense-balance review the v0.98.10 changelog flagged: the footprint rebalance pushed most buildings to 2x2+, which grants +1 defense under the v0.34.0 rule (GDD:1650). Confirm the roster-wide buff is intended or re-derive the affected values.

2D-residual GDD sweep: re-point the tile-constant note (GDD:4816 still cites retired enemy_base.gd / fog_of_war.gd / noise_heatmap.gd), the auto_pause frame-tick rows (~4648), and era-stamp the M3 roadmap deliverables (~2083).
Capture and log a world_3d profiler run at 1000-3000 enemies in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md (25 rows, no 3D-crowd baseline) before gameplay drives the 3D crowd; compounded by the footprint-density bump.
Refresh or retire docs/ARCHITECTURE.md off its v0.80.1 / 2D-stack snapshot (GDD cites it as the synced source) and delete the orphaned source/vfx/damage_number.gd(.uid) in the same pass.

After the commit (which self-corrects workTreeClean), repoint the dashboard roster metrics (units/buildings/enemies/tests all read 0) at the 3D roster counts or mark them migrating, and re-run git fsck so the integrity signal is clean.
